name: macros
description: Subagent orchestration workflows, active modes, and command shorthands: map-reduce, chunked (ordered task sequencing), packet (durable filesystem handoffs), calibrate (progressive mental-model alignment), leeway (interpretive latitude without needless rigidity), research-backed critique, consensus review, sequential passes, rigor mode, orchestrate (delegate-by-default mode), askme, delegate, tmi, dry-run, timeless, dredge (search prior chats), timestamp (date-prefix new paths), and new (scaffold a custom macro)
